raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/2025, I paid a {$500.00} security deposit to XXXX XXXX  after being told by their leasing agent that it was fully refundable if I chose not to move forward. I only signed a rental application, never a lease or contract, and never moved in. After deciding not to proceed, I informed the leasing office, and they confirmed by email on XX/XX/XXXX that a refund check was sent ( it was allegedly sent out on XX/XX/XXXX ). However, I never received the refund despite multiple follow-ups on XX/XX/XXXX, XX/XX/XXXX, XX/XX/XXXX, and XX/XX/XXXX. I disputed the charge with Citi ( after a month of XXXX XXXX lying to me ), but eventually they closed the dispute against me without providing the merchants response or documentation, even though I asked Citi XXXX times for that information. I did not receive the goods or services I paid for and am requesting a full refund. 

Merchant Name : XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX Merchant Address : XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX, XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX Merchant Website : XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX Merchant Phone Number : ( XXXX ) XXXX
